title: lupinus paniculatus var. pubescens
intro: Lupinus paniculatus var. pubescens, also known as the shrubby lupin, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the western Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant activities, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lupinus paniculatus var. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
